title: elelis austriaca
intro: Elelis austriaca, also known as Elecampane, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant's roots and rhizomes have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it a valuable remedy for respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Elelis austriaca include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural expectorant to clear mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of Elelis austriaca include tinctures, teas, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it's often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
